activities_projects.title: Understanding Biodiversity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of biodiversity and its importance
steps: Write the definition of biodiversity from the chapter
List five examples of plants and animals found in your region
Explain why biodiversity is important for human survival
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand biodiversity and its importance in ecosystems

activities_projects.title: Flora and Fauna Around Us
steps: Observe plants and animals around your house or school
List at least five plants and five animals
Write one use or importance of each

activities_projects.title: Types of Forests Classification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the categories of forests in India
steps: Write the definitions of Reserved Forests, Protected Forests, and Unclassed Forests
Give one example state where each type exists
Explain which category is most valuable for conservation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn classification of forest resources

activities_projects.title: Project Tiger Awareness
steps: Write the year Project Tiger was launched
Explain why tiger conservation was needed
List three tiger reserves in India

activities_projects.title: National Parks and Sanctuaries
steps: Locate three national parks and two wildlife sanctuaries on the map
Write the state where each is located
Mention one animal protected in each park
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about wildlife conservation areas

activities_projects.title: Human Impact on Wildlife
activities_projects.objective: Understand causes of depletion of flora and fauna
steps: List five human activities affecting forests and wildlife
Explain how each activity damages biodiversity
Suggest one solution for each problem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand environmental threats and solutions

activities_projects.title: Chipko Movement Study
activities_projects.objective: Learn about community participation in conservation
steps: Write when and where the Chipko Movement started
Explain how villagers protected trees
Describe its impact on forest conservation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand role of people in conservation

activities_projects.title: Sacred Groves Exploration
steps: Write what sacred groves are
Give examples of trees considered sacred in India
Explain how cultural beliefs help protect forests
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about traditional conservation methods

activities_projects.title: Community Conservation Efforts
steps: Describe how villagers in Rajasthan protected forests
Write about Joint Forest Management (JFM)
Explain why community participation is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize importance of community participation

activities_projects.title: Protecting Environment in Daily Life
steps: Write five practices you follow to protect nature
Explain how each practice helps the environment
Share these ideas with classmates
